arts.ttl: Determined Portsmouth can't break down resolute promotion chasers Burnley
arts.sum: Pompey couldn’t breach Burnley’s impregnable defence as it finished goalless at Fratton.

arts.ttl: West Ham make move and 'lead race' for Portsmouth and Sunderland-linked forward
arts.sum: West Ham are ‘leading the race’ to land Pompey-linked Celtic youngster Daniel Cummings.

arts.ttl: Sources: Burnley set to beat Palace and Everton to gem who ‘could be one of the best players England has ever seen’
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm which club Marcus Edwards is now set to join after talks with the likes of Fulham, Crystal Palace and Everton....

arts.ttl: 'If he leaves': Sporting boss addresses Burnley's interest in ex-Tottenham winger Marcus Edwards
arts.sum: Sporting boss Rui Borges insists he has no problems with Marcus Edwards amid his impending move to Burnley.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth fans all say same thing as starting XI and bench named for Burnley
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been reacting to John Mousinho team selection for today’s game against Burnley – and there appears to be harmony among the Fratton faithful.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boosted by return of 2 key players - and newcomer on the bench - for Burnley clash
arts.sum: Rob Atkinson has returned to strengthen Pompey’s side for the tough clash with Burnley.

arts.ttl: Burnley team news vs Portsmouth as two key men miss out - but Manuel Benson returns
arts.sum: Burnley are without captain Josh Brownhill for today’s trip to Portsmouth – but Scott Parker is boosted by the return of Manuel Benson on the bench.

arts.ttl: Manager insists player’s move to Burnley isn’t a ‘relief’ – No issues as transfer finalised
arts.sum: Sporting Club de Portugal manager Rui Borges has insisted that he has no problem with Marcus Edwards as he gears up to join Burnley. Record cover comments from the Sporting boss today on Edwards, who appears to be on the verge of joining Burnley on loan. arts.sum: Burnley could be about to clinch an exciting January transfer window swoop for Sporting winger Marcus Edwards.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Burnley: build-up, team news and live updates from Fratton Park
